info.title: StreamPay API
info.description:
REST API for the StreamPay payment-streaming platform on Stellar.

All error responses use the canonical envelope:
```json
{ "error": { "code": "ERROR_CODE", "message": "Human-readable detail.", "request_id": "req_..." } }
```

v1 stream paths (`/api/streams`) are deprecated and will be removed. Use `/api/v2/streams`.

bearerAuth.description: Obtain a token via POST /api/auth/wallet, then pass it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

message.description: Human-readable description safe to display to clients.
message.example: The requested stream does not exist.

request_id.description: Opaque identifier for this request, useful for log correlation.

StreamV1.description: v1 payment stream shape. **Deprecated** — use `StreamV2` via `/api/v2/streams`.

recipient.description: Stellar public key of the payment recipient.

rate.description: Numeric payment amount per schedule interval.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the stream.

nextAction.description: The next permitted action for the authenticated user.

recipient.description: Stellar public key of the payment recipient.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the stream.

allowed_actions.description: Actions the authenticated user may perform on this stream. Replaces v1 `actions`.

settlement.description: Settlement details once the stream has been settled, otherwise `null`. Clients must handle `null` explicitly.

challenge.description: One-time nonce the client must sign with their Stellar private key.

token.description: Opaque bearer token. Pass as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid bearer token.

error.message: This endpoint is not available in production.

404.description: Not found — the requested resource does not exist.

409.description: Conflict — the operation is not valid for the current stream state.

error.message: Cannot delete a stream that is active or paused. Stop it first.

422.description: Unprocessable entity — request body failed schema validation.

error.message: One or more fields are invalid.

get.description: Returns a one-time nonce the client must sign with their Stellar private key, then submit to `POST /api/auth/wallet`.

post.summary: Verify a signed challenge and issue a bearer token

signature.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature of the challenge.

get.description: Returns a cursor-paginated list of streams owned by the authenticated identity. **Deprecated** — use `GET /api/v2/streams` instead.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of streams to return (1–100, default 20).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous response `meta.nextCursor` field.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter results to streams with this status.

single-active-stream.summary: One active stream, no further pages

paginated-first-page.summary: First page of a multi-page result

error.message: Too many requests. Retry after 30 seconds.

post.description:
Creates a new payment stream in `draft` status. **Deprecated** — use `POST /api/v2/streams` instead.

Supplying an `Idempotency-Key` header makes this request idempotent; replaying the same key and body returns the cached response.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated key (UUID recommended) to make the request idempotent.

recipient.description: Stellar public key of the payment recipient (56-character G… address).

rate.description: Positive decimal payment amount per schedule interval (max 7 decimal places).

token.description: Stellar asset code (optional, defaults to XLM).

201.description: Stream created. Initial status is `draft`; call `POST /api/streams/{id}/start` to activate.

409.description: Idempotency key reused with a different request body.

error.message: Idempotency key has been used with a different request.
Too many requests. Retry after 30 seconds.

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant context for multi-tenant isolation. Must be a non-empty string.

get.description:
Returns a single stream by ID in the v1 shape. **Deprecated** — use `GET /api/v2/streams/{id}` instead.

Responses are cached; a cache hit returns `X-Cache: HIT`.

X-Cache.description: Whether the response was served from cache (`HIT`) or fetched from the data store (`MISS`).

draft-stream.summary: A newly created stream waiting to be started

active-stream.summary: A running stream that can be paused or stopped

error.message: Too many requests. Retry after 30 seconds.

post.description:
Partially updates a stream by merging the request body fields. **Deprecated** — there is no direct v2 equivalent; update streams via their lifecycle action sub-routes.

The `updatedAt` field is always refreshed. Cache is invalidated on success.

schema.description: Partial stream fields to update. Any top-level `StreamV1` field may be included.

400.description: Missing `x-tenant-id` header or invalid JSON body.

error.message: Request body must be valid JSON
Too many requests. Retry after 30 seconds.

delete.description:
Permanently deletes a stream. **Deprecated** — use `DELETE /api/v2/streams/{id}` instead.

A stream must be in `draft` or `ended` status before it can be deleted. Attempting to delete an `active` or `paused` stream returns 409. Cache is invalidated on success.

error.message: Too many requests. Retry after 30 seconds.

get.description: Returns all streams owned by the authenticated user in the v2 shape (`allowed_actions`, `created_at`, `settlement`).

recipient.description: Stellar public key of the recipient (56-character G… address).

rate.description: Positive decimal payment amount per schedule interval (max 7 decimal places).

token.description: Stellar asset code (optional, defaults to XLM).

get.description: Returns a single stream by ID in the v2 shape.

active-stream.summary: Running stream that can be paused or stopped

delete.description: Permanently deletes a stream. The stream must be in `draft` or `ended` status; attempting to delete an `active` or `paused` stream returns 409.

post.description: Accepts failed webhook events for reprocessing. No authentication required (secured at the network/gateway level).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to return (1–100, default 20).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous response.

post.summary: Sign a payload via KMS (debug only)
post.description: **Non-production only.** Returns a base64-encoded signature for the given payload. Returns 403 in production.

tags.name: Streams v1
tags.description: Payment stream management (v1, deprecated — use Streams)
